title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at JioMart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About JioMart Capital India:
JioMart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart Capital India!
